articles.title: Tokenized RWA Market Cap Rises 40% to Top $51 Billion
articles.summary: The tokenized RWA market reached $51 billion in market cap, a 40% year-to-date gain while the broader crypto market fell about 20%, with private credit comprising 47% of total value. The sector is bifurcating around two structural models: broker-dealer custody arrangements that enable 24/7 trading but strip registered shareholder status, versus the settlement infrastructure model pursued by Figure, Securitize, and Coinbase that confers full on-chain ownership rights.

articles.title: Bitcoin Back Above $60,000, ETH and SOL Recoup Losses as AI Stocks Stage Rebound
articles.summary: Bitcoin bounced above $60,000 after a dip to $59,200, but weekly losses remain steep: BTC off 5.4%, ETH down 7.9% to $1,616, XRP down 9.2% to $1.07, and SOL, HYPE, and DOGE posting double-digit weekly declines. Bitcoin's proximity to its 200-week moving average mirrors setups from 2015, 2018, and 2022, each of which preceded crypto winters lasting six months to nearly two years.

articles.title: Kraken Expands OTC Lending Through On-Chain Warehouse Facility
articles.summary: Kraken and Maple Finance have launched an on-chain OTC lending warehouse facility modeled on asset-backed securitization, with Maple providing senior financing via a bankruptcy-remote SPV and Kraken serving as loan originator, servicer, and junior lender taking the first-loss position.

articles.title: Towards Native Post-Quantum Private ETH
articles.summary: Harvest-now-decrypt-later vulnerabilities make reactive quantum-resistance approaches insufficient for private ETH. A proposal on ethresear.ch calls for proactive, L1-native quantum-resistant cryptography using hash-based proof systems. ML-KEM (Kyber) replaces traditional key agreement, SPHINCS+ covers stateless spending authorization, and a phased progressive pool uncapping mechanism would expand deposit limits during early deployment.

articles.title: Aave Token Could Climb 50x by End of 2030
articles.summary: Standard Chartered analysts project Aave reaching $3,500 by end-2030, alongside forecasts of $500,000 for Bitcoin and $40,000 for Ethereum. The Aave thesis rests on a projected 37-fold expansion of tokenized assets deployed in DeFi to $2.7 trillion by 2030, with Aave capturing revenue through lending spread fees.

articles.title: Fed Proposes Payment Accounts for Crypto and Fintech Firms
articles.summary: The Federal Reserve has proposed a new payment accounts category for non-bank fintech and crypto firms, offering Fed access without discount window privileges, interest, or intraday credit, and capped at $1 billion. Public comments close July 27 and Congress is debating whether to legislate the framework.

articles.title: What Should Exist on HyperEVM?
articles.summary: HyperEVM is the programmable layer over HyperCore, where read precompiles let contracts query the exchange state and CoreWriter lets contracts submit actions back to the exchange. The long-term thesis is a unified financial account where a single balance moves across trading, borrowing, yield, hedging, and payments, with HyperCore serving as the underlying balance sheet.

articles.title: Brian Armstrong Signals More Coinbase Acquisitions After Deribit Deal
articles.summary: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong said further acquisitions are on the table following the $2.9B Deribit deal.

articles.title: SBI Holdings to Acquire Bitbank for $288.6M
articles.summary: SBI Holdings has agreed to acquire all shares of Japanese crypto exchange Bitbank for approximately 46.7 billion yen (~$288.6M), expected to close in October.

articles.title: 50% of UK Wealth Advisors Say Client Crypto Sits Outside Their Visibility
articles.summary: A CoinShares survey of 261 European wealth management professionals found that 50% of UK advisors say most of their clients' crypto holdings sit outside their oversight.

articles.title: Crypto Exchanges Are Becoming RWA Venues
articles.summary: Binance's USDT-margined perpetuals data shows metals, oil, and equities now outpacing altcoins (excluding the top 10) by average single-asset volume.
